reason: This is a common Islamic prayer/dhikr praising Allah, with no extremist content or violent rhetoric
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
original_post: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ عَدَدَ خَلْقِهِ ، وَرِضَا نَفْسِهِ ، وَزِنَة عَرْشِهِ ، وَمِدَادَ كَلِمَاتِه
